en.extract:
The Kikuyu white-eye (Zosterops kikuyuensis) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It was formerly considered a subspecies of montane white-eye (Z. poliogastrus). It is found in central Kenya, in the Aberdare Mountains and on Mount Kenya. IUCN categorizes it as of least concern.

The '''Kikuyu white-eye''' ('''''Zosterops kikuyuensis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. It was formerly considered a subspecies of [[montane white-eye]] (''Z. poliogastrus''). It is found in central [[Kenya]], in the [[Aberdare Mountains]] and on [[Mount Kenya]]. [[IUCN]] categorizes it as of [[least concern]].<ref name="iucn status 13 November 2021" />
